holdings.infoBox: DAPP is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are Hut 8 stock at 8.02%, Block at 6.94%, IREN Limited at 6.87%, Applied Digital at 6.69%, and Cipher Digital at 6.27%.

overview.description: The VanEck Digital Transformation ETF (DAPP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Digital Assets Equity index, a market-cap-weighted index of global innovative companies that are involved in the digitalization of the worlds economy through a diverse range of digital assets. DAPP was launched on Apr 12, 2021 and is issued by VanEck.

data.title: VanEck Announces Year-End Distributions for VanEck Equity ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck announced today the 2025 annual distributions per share for its VanEck equity exchange-traded funds.

data.title: VanEck: Bitcoin is a “Screaming Buy” for 2024; Firm's DAPP ETF Passes $100mm in AUM as Global Assets in VanEck Crypto-Linked Funds Approach $1 Billion
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--VanEck's DAPP ETF passes $100mm in AUM, firm notes that Bitcoin is a "screaming buy" for 2024, as it shares borader outlook on digital assets space.
